title: Upon Electra.
content:
When out of bed my love doth spring,
    'Tis but as day a-kindling;
    But when she's up and fully dress'd,
    'Tis then broad day throughout the east.
meaning:
"Upon Electra." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
